violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Tartar sauce which was prepared on site, date marked 12/8 was observed held beyond the 7 days. Food items exceeding the 7 days shall be discarded. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Shellstock (clams) located in the walk-in cooler did not have the proper identification tags. Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the shellstock are received until the container is empty. The person in charge placed the tag in the container during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

Shellfish tags did not have the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (fry basket) were observed with debris from a metal scouring pad. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
The fry baskets located on the rack above the 3-bay are not in good repair. Metal wires are frayed. Per person in charge, fry baskets will be disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the knife rack have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
